scripts.build: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.minify:js: terser js/app.js -o js/app.min.js && terser js/data.js -o js/data.min.js && terser js/storage.js -o js/storage.min.js && terser js/components.js -o js/components.min.js && terser js/auth-simple.js -o js/auth-simple.min.js
scripts.minify:js:pages: terser js/pages/dashboard.js -o js/pages/dashboard.min.js && terser js/pages/members.js -o js/pages/members.min.js && terser js/pages/attendance.js -o js/pages/attendance.min.js && terser js/pages/finance.js -o js/pages/finance.min.js && terser js/pages/inventory.js -o js/pages/inventory.min.js
scripts.minify:all: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js && npm run minify:js:pages
scripts.dev: echo 'Running in development mode - no minification'
